chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1881 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 7146/24 3.For hearing of main case 06-11-2025 Syed Naimat Ali Shah, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah, D.A.G. **** Counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is according disposed of as not pressed along with listed application(s). JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
